summary: Iteration 21: Dynamic Token Package Configuration Testing - All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: buy-tokens page shows dynamic packages with bonus badges, admin Financial tab has 'Gestao de Pacotes de Tokens' section with full CRUD functionality.

Package cards display title, tokens, price - VERIFIED
Bonus badges (+5 GRATIS, +10 GRATIS) visible on packages with bonus - VERIFIED
Packages sorted by price (R$7.00, R$9.99, R$19.99) - VERIFIED
Purchase button shows total tokens including bonus - VERIFIED

server.py.lines_2089-2095: Public active packages endpoint (GET /api/token-packages/active) sorted by price
server.py.lines_2797-2860: Client purchase endpoint supports dynamic package_config_id with tokens+bonus calculation

api.ts.lines_208-250: Frontend API methods: getActiveTokenPackages, getAdminTokenPackages, createTokenPackageConfig, updateTokenPackageConfig, deleteTokenPackageConfig

dashboard.tsx.lines_72-86: Token package state management (tokenPackages, tpLoading, showTpForm, etc.)

buy-tokens.tsx.complete_file: Dynamic package listing with bonus badges, package selection, purchase flow

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 features from the request have been implemented correctly
Admin CRUD endpoints properly validate input and require admin role
Public endpoint correctly filters only active packages and sorts by price
Client purchase supports both dynamic package_config_id and legacy packages field
Commission distribution is fixed at R$3 per sale (R$1 per level, 3 levels) regardless of package price
Frontend buy-tokens page dynamically loads packages with bonus badges
Admin Financial tab has complete token package management UI
seed_data_creation: 3 token packages already exist in DB: Pacote Basico (7 tokens, R$7), Promocao de Boas-vindas (10+5 tokens, R$9.99), Pacote Premium (25+10 tokens, R$19.99)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 complete. Dynamic Token Package Configuration feature fully verified. Backend: 20/20 tests passed for admin CRUD, public listing, client purchase, and commission distribution. Frontend: buy-tokens page shows dynamic packages with bonus badges, admin Financial tab has 'Gestao de Pacotes de Tokens' section with full CRUD.
